task_objective: 8-Second Video Prompt - Transform 1 source image into cinematic video prompt following 4-position layout (CENTER inspiration → TOP-LEFT sketch → TOP-RIGHT render → BOTTOM campaign), auto-detect product category, English-only, no reasoning

input_assets.source_image: Input Image - Visual elements, layout composition, subject matter, color palette, textures, narrative flow (auto-detected: garment/footwear/nail/accessory)

workflow.step_1: Auto-detect product category from source image, extract: inspiration aesthetics, structural elements, material textures, campaign potential
workflow.step_2: Map source image to 4-position layout: CENTER inspiration → TOP-LEFT sketch → TOP-RIGHT render → BOTTOM campaign, build 8-second timeline with category-adapted transitions
workflow.step_3: Output complete English video prompt with seamless morphing transitions, camera movements, style keywords

prompt_structure.opening: A cinematic 8-second [auto-detected category] video with seamless morphing transitions.
prompt_structure.segment_1: [0s-2s: Inspiration → Sketch] Close-up of the image at CENTER position (inspiration). Visual elements detach and float, transforming into ink lines that rapidly sketch the design outline on dark background, referencing the image at TOP-LEFT position (sketch). [Camera movement]. [Lighting/mood].
prompt_structure.segment_2: [2s-5s: Sketch → Render] The sketch at TOP-LEFT position instantly gains volume. Materials and textures materialize to fill the design shape in real-time. Camera pushes in to show texture changing from 2D drawing to 3D realistic product, referencing the image at TOP-RIGHT position (render). [Camera movement]. [Atmosphere].
prompt_structure.segment_3: [5s-8s: Grand Reveal] Seamless transition to wide shot of model/subject wearing the finished design in a stylish setting matching inspiration mood, referencing the image at BOTTOM position (campaign). [Camera movement]. [Cinematic atmosphere].

output_requirements: Output ONLY English video prompt, no reasoning/explanation; each segment must explicitly specify the image position being referenced (CENTER / TOP-LEFT / TOP-RIGHT / BOTTOM)
Auto-detect product category and adapt all descriptions accordingly (garment→fabric drape, footwear→sole curve, nail→gloss texture, etc.)
8-second timeline [0s-2s]/[2s-5s]/[5s-8s], each segment: subject + dynamic action + camera movement + lighting/atmosphere
Seamless morphing transitions between segments; consistent subject + object permanence to prevent artifacts; ONE camera movement per segment
Model type auto-adapted from source image; include style keywords + camera summary at end
